$comment: VS Code Copilot agent-hooks registration (preview). Same gate_guard as .claude/settings.json — VS Code may parse both and run the guard twice per tool; that is harmless (read-only, idempotent deny). Matchers are ignored by VS Code, so gate_guard runs on every tool and passes anything that carries no file path.

SessionStart.command: test -f .agentloop/state.md && echo '--- AgentLoop current state (top of .agentloop/state.md) ---' && sed -n '1,20p' .agentloop/state.md || true
